_comment: Canonical axis label cases for Amanogawa.Atlas.TimeScale.Format (issue #020), consumed verbatim by both test/amanogawa/atlas/time_scale/format_test.exs (ExUnit) and assets/js/test/time_format.test.js (node:test). Astronomical years follow the project-wide convention (1 BCE = year 0, .claude/rules/geo-temporal.md); the BCE cases use the same conversion as Amanogawa.HistoricalDate.Formatter (astronomical year -489 = 490 av. J.-C., the Battle of Marathon).

cases.label: deep past, ka BP regime (coarse step, year at the BP threshold and beyond)
antiquity, plain BCE year (Battle of Marathon)
